import io
import string

let line = io.read_to_end()
let parts = string.split_whitespace(line)
mut a = 0
mut b = 0
match parts.get(0)
when Some(s)
  match string.parse_int(s)
  when Some(n)
    a = n
  when None
    a = 0
  end
when None
  a = 0
end
match parts.get(1)
when Some(s)
  match string.parse_int(s)
  when Some(n)
    b = n
  when None
    b = 0
  end
when None
  b = 0
end

mut x = a
mut y = b
while y != 0
  let t = x % y
  x = y
  y = t
end

println("gcd=#{x}")
